title: Mandela Day Soccer Celebration Unites Communities in 67-Minute Tribute Match
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The spirit of Nelson...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The spirit of Nelson Mandela was alive and thriving on the pitch at the Oudtshoorn Infantry School as the second annual Mandela Day Soccer Celebration kicked off with a symbolic 67-minute match between Superstrikers FC and OLFA Dysselsdorp FC.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The spirit of Nelson Mandela was alive and thriving on the pitch at the Oudtshoorn Infantry School as the second annual Mandela Day Soccer Celebration kicked off with a symbolic 67-minute match between Superstrikers FC and OLFA Dysselsdorp FC."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event brought together young soccer talent and their communities for a day of unity, friendship, and sport. The 67-minute match pays tribute to the 67 years Mandela dedicated to fighting for social justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This match was more than just a game,” said Major Desiree Mawela, “It was our contribution to honor Tata Madiba while creating a space where young people could come together, meet new friends, enjoy the game, and strengthen bonds with their teams, families, and coaches.”","html":"“This match was more than just a game,” said Major Desiree Mawela, “It was our contribution to honor Tata Madiba while creating a space where young people could come together, meet new friends, enjoy the game, and strengthen bonds with their teams, families, and coaches.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Communities from Oudtshoorn, Dysselsdorp, Lategansvlei and Beaufort West were represented, using the day to shine a spotlight on junior soccer development and community upliftment.","html":"Communities from Oudtshoorn, Dysselsdorp, Lategansvlei and Beaufort West were represented, using the day to shine a spotlight on junior soccer development and community upliftment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the anticipation of a new junior league season, the event served as both a celebration and a reminder of the unifying power of sport.","html":"With the anticipation of a new junior league season, the event served as both a celebration and a reminder of the unifying power of sport."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gratitude was extended to Colonel Tiisetso Sekgobela for his support in allowing Alpha FC Oudtshoorn, the Infantry School’s junior football club, to host the festivities on the school’s sports grounds.","html":"Gratitude was extended to Colonel Tiisetso Sekgobela for his support in allowing Alpha FC Oudtshoorn, the Infantry School’s junior football club, to host the festivities on the school’s sports grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This was more than just a soccer match, it was a celebration of Mandela’s legacy and the positive future we’re building through sport,” Mawela added.","html":"“This was more than just a soccer match, it was a celebration of Mandela’s legacy and the positive future we’re building through sport,” Mawela added."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results","html":"Results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Opening match for 67 minutes in honour of Mandela Day:","html":"Opening match for 67 minutes in honour of Mandela Day:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"First match:","html":"First match:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• U17 Dysselsdorp FC aka OLFA - 03","html":"• U17 Dysselsdorp FC aka OLFA -
